category_sources: Official yle-dl homepage describes it as a command-line program for downloading video and audio from Yle services.
source_facts.description says yle-dl downloads Yle videos from the command line.
display_name_sources: Official project homepage title is yle-dl.
docs_sources: Official project homepage links to GitHub source, whose README is an additional official documentation surface.
source_facts.homepage is the official English project documentation page.
repo_sources: Official project homepage says code is on GitHub and search result identifies aajanki/yle-dl as Download videos from Yle servers; source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes downloading video and audio from Yle Areena and related Yle sites.
source_facts.description identifies command-line Yle video downloading.
source_facts.executables lists yle-dl as a CLI executable.
